connection.pendingActions: {{count}} pending actions will sync when online

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: When you have new assignments or updates, they will appear here.

messages.NEW_TRIP: You have been assigned to trip: {{tripName}}
messages.NEW_AGENCY: You have been added to agency: {{agencyName}}
messages.NEW_DRIVER: Welcome {{driverName}}! Your driver account is ready.

start.title: Trip Started
start.body: Your trip has begun. Safe travels!

boarding.title: Boarding Started
boarding.body: Boarding has started at{{stationName}}. Get ready!

completed.title: Arrived at Station
completed.body: Arrived at{{stationName}}. All passengers accounted for.

actions.startTripConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to start this trip? This will notify the agency and passengers.
actions.emergencyConfirmMessage: This will cancel the trip and notify everyone. Use only in real emergencies.

deleted.title: Trip Deleted
deleted.description: This trip has been removed and is no longer available.

cancelled.title: Trip Cancelled
cancelled.description: This trip has been cancelled. Please contact support for more details.

notFound.title: Trip Not Found
notFound.description: We couldn't find the trip you're looking for.

completed.title: Trip Completed
completed.description: This trip has been successfully completed. Thank you for your service!

findCheapTrips.title: Find the best bus fares
findCheapTrips.description: Search and compare the cheapest bus trips available around you.

reserveSeat.title: Reserve your seat instantly
reserveSeat.description: Pick your preferred seat and confirm your reservation effortlessly.

onlinePayment.title: Enjoy secure online payments
onlinePayment.description: Pay for your trips directly in the app with fast and reliable payment options.

travelWithEase.title: Travel with peace of mind
travelWithEase.description: Access your tickets anytime, track schedules, and receive reminders before departure.

getStarted.title: Ready to go?
getStarted.description: Your next trip is only a tap away. Explore the app and start your journey.

emptyState.title: No Trips Found
emptyState.description: You don't have any upcoming trips at the moment. New assignments will appear here when available.
emptyState.suggestion1: Check back later for new trip assignments
emptyState.suggestion2: Use the scan button to validate tickets when needed

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.notLoggedInMessage: Please log in to view and edit your profile settings.

banned.title: Access Suspended
banned.description: Your account has been suspended by the administration.
banned.contactSupport: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact your agency administrator.

login.title: Login
login.heading: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
login.emailMinLength: Email must be at least 1 character
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 32 characters

scan.scanHint: Align QR code within the frame

messages.invalid: Ticket is invalid or already used
messages.unassociatedTrip: Ticket is not associated with this trip
messages.notFound: Ticket not found or QR is invalid

register.title: Sign Up
register.heading: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join us and start your journey
register.firstNameMaxLength: First name must be at most 32 characters
register.lastNameMaxLength: Last name must be at most 32 characters
register.emailMinLength: Email must be at least 1 character
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 32 characters
register.success: Registration successful! Please verify your email.
register.phoneNumberMinLength: Phone number must be at least 1 character

otp.title: Verify Your Email
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
otp.invalidCode: Invalid OTP code. Please try again.
otp.newCodeSent: A new verification code has been sent to your email.
otp.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.

trips.title: Trips
trips.empty_subtitle: You don't have any trips assigned yet.
trips.no_results_subtitle: We couldn't find any trips matching "{{query}}". Try a different search term.
trips.no_filters_results: No trips found matching your active filters. Try adjusting them.

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again

payment.title: Complete Payment
payment.description: You're about to pay for your bus ticket. Tap the button below to proceed with secure payment.
payment.successMessage: Your ticket has been generated and is ready to use.
payment.failedMessage: We couldn't process your payment. Please try again.
payment.pendingMessage: Your payment is being processed. This may take a moment.
payment.browserNotAvailable: Browser is not available on this device.
payment.browserError: Could not open payment page. Please try again.
payment.initFailed: Could not initialize payment. Please try again.

reservation.title: Confirm Your Trip
reservation.subtitle: Review your trip details before proceeding to payment
reservation.info: A seat will be automatically assigned to you. Your ticket will be generated after successful payment.
reservation.autoSeatAssignment: A seat will be automatically assigned to you based on availability.
reservation.authRequiredMessage: You need to be logged in to book a trip.
reservation.seatRequiredMessage: Please select a seat to continue with your booking.
reservation.bookingFailed: Could not create booking. Please try again.

seatPicker.title: Select Your Seat
seatPicker.selectPrompt: Tap on an available seat to select it

waiting.prepare_scanner: Prepare your scanner when the time comes.

report.title: Report an Issue
report.subtitle: Select the type of issue and provide details
